steps.title: Identify what the question needs
steps.content: The question asks for the function of the underlined sentence in the text as a whole. The lady "gazed disdainfully at the whole house" and the underlined sentence is what she imagines herself saying to the other patrons. The job of the sentence is to show the reader what that disdain looks like in practice.

steps.title: Eliminate the choices
steps.content:
• Choice A — 'It illustrates the lady\'s contemptuous attitude toward the other people in the theater.': The sentence is the lady\'s imagined speech scorning the other patrons as "upstarts and provincials" — that is contempt, illustrated directly. ✓
  • Choice B — 'It helps explain why some people are especially perceptive of the social dynamics at theaters.': The passage says nothing about perceptiveness or social dynamics as a general topic. The lady is expressing scorn, not insight. ✗
  • Choice C — 'It emphasizes a character\'s dedication to her career.': No career is mentioned anywhere in the passage. This is entirely off-topic. ✗
  • Choice D — 'It conveys the urgency some theater patrons feel to be the first ones to arrive at a performance.': The lady arrived later than everyone else and boasts about it — she is not eager to arrive first. This directly contradicts the passage. ✗
That matches choice A — A is correct.
